meaning: n.桑塞尔白葡萄酒(产于法国中部卢瓦尔河流域)
examples: Located in the heart of the Sancerre region in the village of Chavignol in the Loire valley, this producer of great Sancerre and Pouilly-Fume supplies Paris' finest restaurants.
Wine flavors are influenced by different grape varieties and terroir, which at certain cases plays a bigger role than we think. Here Sancerre and Chablis provide a good example.
